languages.original_text: "A stark demonstration of the irrational thinking inherent to xenos of your species. Augur scans have given no indication whatsoever that the celestial body carrying the station possesses some... spark of life. Stop explaining natural phenomena through the prism of your own primitive views, it is profanity at its most flagrant."

languages.text: "Яркая демонстрация иррационального мышления, присущего ксеносам вашего вида. Авгурационное сканирование не показало ни единого признака того, что небесное тело, несущее станцию, обладает некоей... одушевленностью. Прекратите объяснять естественные явления через призму собственных примитивных воззрений, это чистой воды профанация".

"A stark demonstration of the irrational thinking inherent to xenos of your species. Augur scans have given no indication whatsoever that the celestial body carrying the station possesses some... spark of life. Stop explaining natural phenomena through the prism of your own primitive views, it is profanity at its most flagrant."

"A stark demonstration of the irrational thinking inherent to xenos of your species. Augur scans have given no indication whatsoever that the celestial body carrying the station possesses some... spark of life. languages.text: 「私の意見を聞いてください。この駅を支えているものは、長い間機能してきました。私の同僚ヌンシウスは、その力はまだ破壊されていないと信じています。残っているものを守るのも私たちの仕事です」
languages.original_text: "If I may question your assessment: whatever is keeping this station afloat has been working for a long time. My colleague Nuncius believes that this power has not yet been destroyed, and it is our job to preserve what remains of it."

traits.locale_text: 「私の意見を聞いてください。この駅を支えているものは、長い間機能してきました。私の同僚ヌンシウスは、その力はまだ破壊されていないと信じています。残っているものを守るのも私たちの仕事です。」

languages.text: « Une démonstration flagrante des raisonnements irrationnels inhérents aux xénos de votre espèce. Les analyses des augures n'ont montré aucun signe que le corps céleste qui transporte la station possédait une quelconque... étincelle de vie. Cessez d'expliquer des phénomènes naturels par le biais de vos croyances primitives, il s'agit là d'un blasphème notoire. »
languages.original_text: "A stark demonstration of the irrational thinking inherent to xenos of your species. Augur scans have given no indication whatsoever that the celestial body carrying the station possesses some... spark of life. Stop explaining natural phenomena through the prism of your own primitive views, it is profanity at its most flagrant."

traits.locale_text: « Une démonstration flagrante des raisonnements irrationnels inhérents aux xénos de votre espèce. Les analyses des augures n'ont montré aucun signe que le corps céleste qui transporte la station possédait une quelconque... étincelle de vie. Cessez d'expliquer des phénomènes naturels par le biais de vos croyances primitives, il s'agit là d'un blasphème notoire. »

languages.text: "Eine überzeugende Demonstration der irrationalen Denkweise von Xenos Eurer Spezies. Die Augurenscans haben keinen Hinweis ergeben, ob der Himmelskörper, der die Station trägt, einen ... Lebensfunken birgt. Hört auf, natürliche Phänomene durch das Prisma Euer primitiven Sichtweise zu erklären, eine größere Gottlosigkeit gibt es ja kaum."
languages.original_text: "A stark demonstration of the irrational thinking inherent to xenos of your species. Augur scans have given no indication whatsoever that the celestial body carrying the station possesses some... spark of life. Stop explaining natural phenomena through the prism of your own primitive views, it is profanity at its most flagrant."

Hört auf, natürliche Phänomene durch das Prisma Euer primitiven Sichtweise zu erklären, eine größere Gottlosigkeit gibt es ja kaum."

languages.text: "Türünün zenolarına özgü mantıksız düşüncenin çarpıcı bir göstergesi. Alamet taramaları, istasyonu taşıyan gök cisminin... Bir yaşam kıvılcımına sahip olduğuna dair hiçbir belirti vermedi. Doğal fenomenleri kendi ilkel görüşlerinizin prizmasından açıklamayı bırakın, bu apaçık küfürdür."
languages.original_text: "A stark demonstration of the irrational thinking inherent to xenos of your species. Augur scans have given no indication whatsoever that the celestial body carrying the station possesses some... spark of life. Stop explaining natural phenomena through the prism of your own primitive views, it is profanity at its most flagrant."

traits.locale_text: "Türünün zenolarına özgü mantıksız düşüncenin çarpıcı bir göstergesi. Alamet taramaları, istasyonu taşıyan gök cisminin... Bir yaşam kıvılcımına sahip olduğuna dair hiçbir belirti vermedi. Doğal fenomenleri kendi ilkel görüşlerinizin prizmasından açıklamayı bırakın, bu apaçık küfürdür."

languages.text: «Una excelente demostración de la irracional forma de pensar de los xenos de tu especie. Los análisis de augures no indican que el cuerpo celeste que lleva la estación tenga una... chispa de vida. Deja de explicar fenómenos naturales mediante el prisma de tu perspectiva primitiva. Es una blasfemia evidente».
languages.original_text: "A stark demonstration of the irrational thinking inherent to xenos of your species. Augur scans have given no indication whatsoever that the celestial body carrying the station possesses some... spark of life. Stop explaining natural phenomena through the prism of your own primitive views, it is profanity at its most flagrant."

traits.locale_text: «Una excelente demostración de la irracional forma de pensar de los xenos de tu especie. Los análisis de augures no indican que el cuerpo celeste que lleva la estación tenga una... chispa de vida. Deja de explicar fenómenos naturales mediante el prisma de tu perspectiva primitiva. Es una blasfemia evidente».

languages.text: “这赤裸裸地展示了你们这类异形所固有的非理性思维。俄歇矩阵的扫描结果并未显示，承载星站的天体拥有什么……生命火花。别再用你那套原始观念来解释自然现象了，这种行为简直是公然的亵渎。”
languages.original_text: "A stark demonstration of the irrational thinking inherent to xenos of your species.
